Notes: Single UPDATE with two identical add_rr operations for the same owner/type/class/RDATA to probe whether the server deduplicates, treats the second add as a semantic conflict, or otherwise errors. Follow with QUERY for the touched TXT RRset.

Steps.Description: Add the same TXT RR twice in one UPDATE to dup.campus.edu. and observe whether the server accepts it idempotently or rejects it as a duplicate/conflict.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the TXT RRset exists after the UPDATE, and if so whether it appears as a single RR.
